Off Calendar Mar-05-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearance:
Alice Loh, Esq., for Deere & Company, Defendant/Moving Party

Tentative Ruling adopted: Defendant Deere & Company's Motion To Compel Responses To Written Discovery is granted in part and moot in part. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to respond to the GO 129 Standard Request For Production and Identification of Documents And Things within 15 days of notice of this order. The court finds that the late responses were a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are imposed against Plaintiff in the amount of $980, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
